transcript: You need some help taking some stuff outta your house?
[laughs] This is Michael. Your neighbor called. Uh, we’re a junk removal place? We— We remove junk and trash?
Why’re you asking if I need junk and trash moved out? I don’t.
You—? Is this—? Um, well, your neighbor just said you did.
I don’t know where he— [stammers] I don’t know where he’s... think he— I am, but, yeah, there’s nothing… there’s nothing in my— in my house.
You have yourself a good day.—
Hello? Go closer to the phone. I can’t hear you.
Hold on, lemme turn off my air conditioner. Victor? Uh, y— your neighbor called and said you might need some, uh, junk removed?
"Why did you call me?", I said.
Okay, well, uh, my phone rang, so…—
I call you? Wha—? What—? Whe—?
Somebody told me that you needed junk removal.
I think you’re a mothafuckin’ chickenshit criminal, if ya wanna know. You’re a criminal!
Ya piece of shit! Drop dead, ya motherfucker!—
Stop calling me. 'Cause I don’t even think you’re fuckin, ah, where I am, so…
You’re a motherfuckin’ chickenshit piece a criminal! You motherfucker chickenshit. You gonna be droppin’… in jail, dead! I pray to God you should drop dead! Fuck you! Fuck you! Fuck you piece of—!
